description: Fix bugs in the WhatsApp trade agent implementation and add comprehensive tests for portfolio CRUD, agent integration, and webhook flow.

userStories.title: Portfolio CRUD tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for portfolio add/remove/get operations so that I can verify the portfolio module works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test add_holding creates a new holding and transaction
Test add_holding updates avg_price on second buy
Test remove_holding reduces quantity and logs transaction

userStories.title: Webhook agent integration test
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to verify that the webhook handler correctly routes inbound messages to the agent processor.
acceptanceCriteria: Test that inbound text messages trigger process_with_agent background task
Test that non-text messages get a fallback acknowledgment

userStories.title: Verify all modules import and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY config
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all new modules to import cleanly and config to load correctly.
